rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Agric. Code §142.001, which defines terms for estray livestock and exotic fowl. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: "Estray" means stray livestock, stray exotic livestock, stray bison, or stray exotic fowl.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns agricultural estray definitions unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
